emails.subject: Re: Coal Presentation
emails.body: Re: Coal Presentation Rebecca: I was just talking to Fred Mitro and he says you have put together a couple of different models on coal. Can you please send me those models, so I can get an idea on how you guys are looking at the analysis. Thanks! Regards, Ben

emails.subject: Re: Coal Presentation
emails.body: Re: Coal Presentation Ben Here is some information I put together when I was working on the coal presentation. The preliminary ecomonics tab looks at the dispatch spread between coal and natural gas and the difference in variable O&M for coal and natural gas plants. If you need a model for a coal plant, I would suggest talking to the Generation Investments group. They are working on a deal where they are buying some coal plants (the Allstrom Deal) and have created models for coal plant ecomomics. I believe Chuck Ward and Bill Keeney are spear-heading that effort. Please let me know if you have any questions about what I've sent you or if I can help you with anything else. Thanks, Rebecca x57968
